## 五、Validation Grade Impact

Current grade: [INSUFFICIENT / OBSERVATIONAL / VALIDATING / VALIDATED / CONFLICTED / REJECTED]

This backtest run impact on grade:
- [ ] Supports advancing grade
- [ ] Insufficient to advance (WAIT)
- [ ] Introduces conflict (WAIT for resolution)

**Note: VALIDATED grade does NOT enable trading.**
